title: Rich Creamy Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A pungent and creamy Malaysian dish featuring saffron and a deglaze-fond, perfect for a weeknight dinner, this keto-friendly recipe is a delicious and flavorful option.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the curry powder and saffron threads and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk and chicken broth, and stir to deglaze the fond from the bottom of the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 15-20 minutes.
Season the curry with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
